text: The more of us who stand together, the more we send a message to Starbucks and also each other, and even people who don't work at Starbucks. That there are folks who aren't going to tolerate being abused by their employer. There are people who aren't going to tolerate unfair working conditions, union busting tactics. I am here today to protest against the unfair labor practices that Starbucks has been thrusting upon us. We have had hours cut. I am ideally scheduled at twenty to twenty-five hours a week, and I'm getting ten. It's difficult, especially with the holiday season. People can't afford gifts for their family. People can't afford rent for their family. I would like to achieve Starbucks actually sitting at the bargaining table with us and discussing a contract and respecting us, because you can't call us partners without treating us like partners.
